reasoning: Teez-Flexx Mobiles needs a premium, trustworthy (iStore-like) but accessible (Back Market-like) aesthetic. A clean white/slate foundation with deep blue for authority and emerald green for trust/action creates a high-conversion, professional environment.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for Hero/Categories, Control Room Grid for Product listings
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl for cards, rounded-full for primary buttons (Apple-style pill buttons)

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-3xl p-8

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border-2 border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-900 px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all

forms.inputs: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent px-4 py-3

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-slate-200/50

interactive_elements.hover_states: All cards and buttons must have hover states (e.g., translate-y-[-2px] or shadow elevation).
interactive_elements.data_testids: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

hero_backgrounds.description: Elegant Apple iPhone next to a MacBook on a wooden desk

services.description: Overhead view of modern workspace with phone

products.description: Variety of colorful phone cases displayed on a wall

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in index.html.
CRITICAL User Flow: The homepage MUST feature 3 prominent, high-impact service selection cards immediately below the hero tagline: (1) Get a Diagnostic, (2) Buy an iPhone, (3) Sell Your iPhone.
Implement a sticky 'backdrop-blur-xl' navigation bar with the logo and key links.
Implement a prominent floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom right for inquiries.
For the E-commerce flow, use a grid layout for products with filters on the left (condition, storage, color).
Use Shadcn UI for forms (Diagnostic, Trade-In), but round the inputs using rounded-xl to match the premium Apple aesthetic.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL buttons, links, and forms for testing.
